name: Generation of Predictable IV with CBC Mode
description: The product generates and uses a predictable initialization vector (IV) with Cipher Block Chaining (CBC) mode, making the encryption susceptible to dictionary attacks and chosen-plaintext attacks when identical keys are used.
detection_pattern: TRANSFORM node performing CBC-mode encryption receives an IV from a TRANSFORM node that uses predictable generation (sequential, timestamp-based, or static values) without a CONTROL node enforcing cryptographically random IV generation
